case_title: 365 FULTON, L.P. VS. LIDUVINA L. CHACON ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT CHACON, LIDUVINA L. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHACON, LIDUVINA L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 365 FULTON STREET #301, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94102 , SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHACON, LIDUVINA L.
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (UNLAWFUL DETAINER-CODE CIVIL PROC., 585(D)) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT CHACON, LIDUVINA L.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $15.02 FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHACON, LIDUVINA L.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT CHACON, LIDUVINA L.
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $470.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHACON, LIDUVINA L.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHACON, LIDUVINA L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT-ISSUE $470.00 COSTS, $766.02 HOLDOVER CHARGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,236.02, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHACON, LIDUVINA L.
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE 30 DAY NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P. SERVED AUG-01-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHACON, LIDUVINA L.
DECLARATION OF CHRISTINA SERRANO IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P.
DECLARATION OF LOST OR OTHERWISE UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P.
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-27-2026.
